headline: Influencer Posts 'Grateful' Caption After Receiving Free Vacation, Also Complains About Wi-Fi
summary: The 12-part Instagram story oscillated between 'blessed' and 'can anyone recommend a VPN?'
fullBody: Brittany Flex sponsored a luxury resort getaway with the caption 'so grateful for this opportunity' while privately DMing the brand about 'unacceptable buffering on the poolside Netflix.' The resort's Wi-Fi, she complained, was 'only 400 mbps, which is basically dial-up.' Her followers saw only curated sunset photos and the word 'manifesting.' The resort has since revoked her influencer status, citing 'emotional damage to the IT department.'
